nodes.label: Tests for the 6 UNDERUTILIZED_DLM fixes:  1. embedding_fn wired into ATOMMemor
Import `real_name` and alias it as `mica_name` in sys.modules.
Verify that ATOMMemorySystem creates and passes embedding_fn to extractor.
Import _build_embedding_fn from system.py source without triggering         the
The trigram hash fallback should produce a normalised 128-dim vector.
Same input should yield the same vector.
Different inputs should yield different vectors.
ATOMMemorySystem.__init__ should accept embedding_fn keyword arg.
The ATOMQuintupleExtractor call should include embedding_fn=.
Empty or very short strings should not crash.
Verify that promote_entities_to_dlm routes entities to typed buckets.
A minimal AtomicTKGSnapshot with entities + quintuples.
Entities should be routed to proteins/drugs/diseases/methods, not just learned.
An entity should appear in only one bucket.
When metadata has subject_type=protein, entity should map to proteins.
When no metadata, predicate keyword should drive classification.
Unknown entity with no matching predicates should fall back to 'learned'.
Should create dlm_learned.yaml if it doesn't exist.
Verify SectionClassifier is integrated into DLMEncoder.
Should return a section type string or None.
When ML classifier is confident, its prediction should be used.
When ML confidence is low, config regex should be used.
Full encode() pipeline should work with classifier wired in.
The router should contain a /atom/jsonld POST route.
JSONLDExportRequest should accept text, user_id, metadata.
Without MICA_EVENT_STORE_DSN, should return ok=False gracefully.
Without MICA_EVENT_STORE_DSN, should return ok=False gracefully.
Full endpoint call should produce XML files.
Full endpoint call should work with the heuristic classifier.
Ensure the 6 fixes integrate correctly with each other.
Encoder + classifier should produce sections with valid types.
Entities promoted to DLM config should be recognizable categories.
All 5 new endpoints should be registered in the router.
